scenarios.name: New customer booking
scenarios.caller: Hi, I need to get my AC looked at. It's blowing warm air.

scenarios.name: Emergency - no heat
scenarios.caller: We have no heat and it's freezing in here. The furnace just stopped.

scenarios.name: Emergency - gas smell
scenarios.caller: I smell gas near my furnace. What should I do?

scenarios.name: Pricing inquiry
scenarios.caller: How much does a new AC unit cost to install?

scenarios.name: Estimate follow-up
scenarios.caller: Hi, I got an estimate last week for duct cleaning. I'm ready to schedule.

scenarios.name: After hours call
scenarios.caller: Are you guys open? I need a tune-up scheduled.
